PatternLayout.pattern: %d{DD-MM-YYYY HH:mm:ss} [%t] %highlight{%5p}{INFO=#90EE90, WARN=yellow bright, ERROR=red bright, FATAL=red bright, DEBUG=cyan bright} %c{1}::%M:%L - %m%n
%d{DD-MM-YYYY HH:mm:ss} [%t] %highlight{%5p}{INFO=#90EE90, WARN=yellow bright, ERROR=red bright, FATAL=red bright, DEBUG=cyan bright} %c{1}::%M:%L - %m%n
